name: /standards-diff decision record carries a timestamp and source identifier for audit traceability
command: mkdir -p standards/snapshots && printf 'r: a\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml && printf 'r: b\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-diff.sh" --source owasp-asvs --current standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml --upstream standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml --decide adopt --change r --decisions standards/decisions.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"timestamp":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"' standards/decisions.jsonl && grep -q '"source":"owasp-asvs"' standards/decisions.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
